entry.title: How to implement hierarchical filtering in TreeTable in SAPUI5?
entry.content:
I'm using the sap.ui.table.TreeTable in SAPUI5 to display hierarchical data (like multi-level BOMs). I want to implement filtering so that when a child node matches the filter, its parents are still visible to maintain the tree structure.

Issue:

Currently, when I use standard filtering (via filter Property on columns), it only filters visible rows. If a match is found in a nested/child node that is collapsed, it doesn’t show up, and its parent is not included either.

Expected Behavior:

If a child or deeper node matches the filter condition:

  • The entire path (i.e., parent → child) should be visible

  • Tree structure should be preserved

  • Filter should work recursively on all levels

Actual Behavior:

  • Filtering only applies to currently visible rows

  • Deep nested matches are ignored unless parent is expanded

  • Filtered result appears empty, even when matching values exist

What I Tried:

I implemented a custom recursive filter on the JSON model before binding to the TreeTable:


This works partially, but:

  • Breaks expand/collapse logic

  • Loses lazy-loading benefits

  • Not ideal for large datasets

My Questions:

  1. Is there a standard way to implement hierarchical filtering in Tree table?

  2. Can Tree table support full-depth filtering while maintaining structure?

  3. Are there any recommended workarounds or best practices?

  4. Is this feature on SAP’s roadmap?

Thanks in advance! Open to all suggestions, links, or alternative approaches.

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
    xmlns:table="sap.ui.table"
    xmlns:m="sap.m">

    <table:TreeTable
        id="idTreeTable"
        rows="{
            path: 'myModel>/Items',
            parameters: {
                arrayNames: ['Children']
            }
        }"
        selectionMode="MultiToggle"
        enableColumnReordering="true"
        alternateRowColors="true"
        visibleRowCount="10">

        <table:columns>
            <table:Column filterProperty="Name" width="20%">
                <m:Label text="Name"/>
                <table:template>
                    <m:Text text="{myModel>Name}" />
                </table:template>
            </table:Column>

            <table:Column filterProperty="Type" width="15%">
                <m:Label text="Type"/>
                <table:template>
                    <m:Text text="{myModel>Type}" />
                </table:template>
            </table:Column>
        </table:columns>

    </table:TreeTable>

</core:FragmentDefinition>

entry.title: Error "Rule Service with given ID does not exist" when Consuming Decision Table API(SBPA)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have created a decision table in SAP Build Process Automation and have successfully released and deployed the project. Following this, I created a trigger from the deployed decision table.

However, when I try to consume this API via Postman, I encounter the following error message:

"The rule service with given id xxxxxxxxxxxxx does not exist."

Has anyone come across this error before? Any insights or suggestions to resolve this would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: Smart Variant Management in 1.71.67 - IT IS NOT WORKING
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a app using version 1.71.67. It need to have variant management feature in the filter bar. 
I am using smart variant management (sap.ui.comp.smartvariant) and filterbar (sap.ui.comp.filterbar). 

I can see the smart variant management in the UI but it doesnt work normally. 
The normal event flow : getFiltersWithValue > fetchData.
In my app : fetchData. 

I think because of this, the variant management doesnt work.
Is there any way, i can use the variant management in this version ? 
Or, we have to use the Variant Management instead ? do you have any sample code ? ( because the one in the API reference is not working as well ) 



Thanks!

entry.title: How to filter the list when the column is 1:n relation
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to create a webapp using SAP Business Application Studio in BTP. 

The app is connected to S4 HANA Cloud system using oData v2 API

I have view which is a list of products. I want to add a search box to filter the result by Production Description column. Production and Product Description has 1:n relation.

I am using the below source codes. But it doesn't work. 

I get the error in the console - Error during request to remote service: Left hand expression of memberaccess operator has wrong cardinality (to many not allowed)

Can someone please help me?

 

                var aTableSearchState =[];
                var sQuery = oEvent.getParameter("query");

                if (sQuery && sQuery.length > 0) {
                    var ProductTypeFilter = new Filter("ProductType", FilterOperator.Contains, sQuery);
                    var MaterialFilter = new Filter("Material", FilterOperator.Contains, sQuery);
                    var LanguageFilter = new Filter("to_Description/Language", FilterOperator.EQ, 'EN');
                    var DescriptionFilter = new Filter("to_Description/Description", FilterOperator.Contains, sQuery);
                    var QueryFilter1 = new Filter({ filters:[LanguageFilter, DescriptionFilter], and: true});
                    //var QueryFilter = new Filter({ filters:[ProductTypeFilter, MaterialFilter], and: false});
                    var QueryFilter = new Filter({ filters:[ProductTypeFilter, MaterialFilter, QueryFilter1], and: false});
                    aTableSearchState.push(QueryFilter);
                }
                this._applySearch(aTableSearchState);
 
         
_applySearch: function(aTableSearchState) {
          
           var oTable = this.byId("table"),
           oViewModel = this.getModel("worklistView");
            oTable.getBinding("items").filter(aTableSearchState, "Application");
            // changes the noDataText of the list in case there are no filter results
            if (aTableSearchState.length !== 0) {
                oViewModel.setProperty("/tableNoDataText", this.getResourceBundle().getText("worklistNoDataWithSearchText"));
            }

        }

entry.title: Offsetting valuated absence hrs from IT2001 for a week coinciding with non-worked OT hrs in IT2010
entry.content:
Hello Team;

 

We have a requirement of offsetting and negating any absence hrs. coming from IT2001 corresponding to a week when non-worked OT hrs., WT 8013 in IT2010 received from EC time sheet application. 

 

So our question here is, as our time application is EC time off , can we build this solution within the scope of payroll schema processing in XT00 for IT2010 hrs.' to identify the week of WT coinciding absences in IT2001? Has sap offered any standard operation to achieve it through PCR?

 

Requesting your quick inputs here as we are on production cutover phase for the go live scheduled this month

 

 

 

 

 

Thanks & regards

 

Tandrima

entry.title: Should the browser cache the Component-preload.js file in an SAPUI5 application ?
entry.content:
I have a simple SAPUI5 application deployed to SAP S/4HANA.  When I access the application from the Fiori Launchpad, the app works and the Component-preload.js is sent to the browser.  But the Component-preload.js file is sent to the browser all the time even when there is no change to the SAPUI5 application - while this is not a big deal, I just want to know if this the correct behavior.  

In a similar app deployed to SAP BTP, the Component-preload.js is only sent if there is a change to the SAPUI5 application.  Otherwise, the browser reads it from the cache.  I was expecting the same behavior in my app deployed to SAP S/4HANA as well...

entry.title: Reason:UI5 is not installed or the sap-ui-version.json file is corrupted
entry.content:
Dear Sap we have issue seems SAP_UI is corrupted nting is working saml2/soamager all giving error 

Unable to retrieve UI5 version information from MIME repository

Message no. /UI5/CM_LOG003

entry.title: Facing issue while deploying a UI5 application
entry.content:
Integrate an SAP UI5 Task in a Business Process | SAP Tutorials 
I was following the above blog for integrating UI5 and automation. Well, I have built an automation process and a UI5 application as well, but the deployed application is not showing up in the HTML5 applications tab as shown below in the images:

 



 

Despite after giving many tries, it fails to show the deployed app link. Can I get any assistance regarding this issue, please ?

entry.title: How to read WBS information from parked documents created in MIR7?
entry.content:
I tried to find the table where the WBS of a parked document is stored, but I couldn't find it.

Currently, there is a report that shows the FI parked document generated from the MM parked document, and they want to see the WBS information of the document as well.

However, I don't know how to read the WBS information.

Can anyone help me?

entry.title: Can't instantiate a fragment after Destory it
entry.content:
Hi, I'm developing a SAPUI5 application and I need to instantiate a fragment (F) within a view (V).

The issue is that the view (V) can be closed by the user. To ensure good performance, I simply destroy it using:

V.destroyDependents();
V.destroyContent();
V.destroy();

However, the user can reopen the same view, which means I need to re-instantiate it, and with it, the fragment. I'm using this code:

Fragment.load({
    name: "webapp.fragment.DocumentaleDialog",
    id: this.createId("dialogDocumentale"),
    controller: this
}).then((oFragment) => {
    that.oDocumentaleDialog = oFragment;
    that.oView.addDependent(that.oDocumentaleDialog);
    openDocumentaleDialog();
});

The problem I'm encountering is a duplicate ID error when I try to instantiate the fragment again.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 navigation tab
entry.content:
hi ,

for you requirement, wizard is the best option. 
However to implement it with Icon Tab Bar, below code worked. I know it is too late and you might not want a solution now. this could help others.
Add these two buttons (Prev and Next) in each of your icon tab filters in View file. Also, make all icon tab filters disabled except first one. ( you can handle them from controller as well based on some parameters or model )

<IconTabFilter text="People" key="people" enabled="false">
    <Text text="People content goes here ..." />
    <Button text="Prev" press="onPrevPress"></Button>                
    <Button text="Next" press="onNextPress"></Button>
</IconTabFilter>

Add below two methods in your controller.
Note : event - source - parent points to the current Icon Tab filter and its parent points to the icon tab bar. There is no method called setSelectedIndex so below is a work around

// trial
onNextPress: function(oEvent){
  const oSource = oEvent.getSource().getParent(); // current icon tab filter
  const oParent = oSource.getParent(); // icon tab bar
  const aItems = oParent.getItems(); // all items of the icon tab bar
  const iCP = oParent.indexOfItem(oSource); // current index

  // disable all
  aItems.forEach((oItem)=>{
    oItem.setEnabled(false);
  });

  // enable next and set it as selected
  iCP === aItems.length - 1 
  ? aItems[0].setEnabled(true) & oParent.setSelectedKey(aItems[0].getKey())
  : aItems[iCP + 1].setEnabled(true) & oParent.setSelectedKey(aItems[iCP + 1].getKey());
},
onPrevPress : function(oEvent){
  const oSource = oEvent.getSource().getParent(); // current icon tab filter
  const oParent = oSource.getParent(); // icon tab bar
  const aItems = oParent.getItems(); // all items of the icon tab bar
  const iCP = oParent.indexOfItem(oSource); // current index
  
  // disable all
  aItems.forEach((oItem)=>{
    oItem.setEnabled(false);
  });

  // enable previous and set it as selected 
  iCP === 0 
  ? aItems[aItems.length - 1].setEnabled(true) & oParent.setSelectedKey(aItems[aItems.length - 1].getKey())
  : aItems[iCP - 1].setEnabled(true) & oParent.setSelectedKey(aItems[iCP - 1].getKey());
}

entry.title: Why QUnit and sinon versions included in SAPUI5 are so old?
entry.content:
I am developing a SAPUI5 app using version 1.120.31 but I I know this question applies for older versions as well.

I have used the single "freestyle" official template available in BAS. 

Like usual, it adds the test folder with unit and integration tests templates. Let me focus on unit tests here.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
	<meta charset="utf-8">
	<title>Unit tests for my app</title>
	<script
		id="sap-ui-bootstrap"
		src="../../resources/sap-ui-core.js"
		data-sap-ui-resourceroots='{
			"my/app/name": "../../",
			"unit": "."
		}'
		data-sap-ui-async="true"
		data-sap-ui-compat-version="edge">
	</script>
	<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="../../resources/sap/ui/thirdparty/qunit-2.css">
	<script src="../../resources/sap/ui/thirdparty/qunit-2.js"></script>
	<script src="../../resources/sap/ui/qunit/qunit-junit.js"></script>
	<script src="../../resources/sap/ui/qunit/qunit-coverage.js"></script>
	<script src="../../resources/sap/ui/thirdparty/sinon.js"></script>
	<script src="../../resources/sap/ui/thirdparty/sinon-qunit.js"></script>
	<script src="unitTests.qunit.js"></script>
</head>
<body>
	<div id="qunit"></div>
	<div id="qunit-fixture"></div>
</body>
</html>

Checking the version of such third party libraries, it's possible to see that they are very old. At the time of this question:

qunit is in version 2.24.1 

sinon is in version 20.0.0

To make it simpler to show that SAPUI5 includes old version of such, you can check such links and the header document available inside each of them

https://ui5.sap.com/1.120.31/resources/sap/ui/thirdparty/qunit-2.js

/*!
 * QUnit 2.3.2
 * https://qunitjs.com/
 *
 * Copyright jQuery Foundation and other contributors
 * Released under the MIT license
 * https://jquery.org/license
 *
 * Date: 2017-04-18T02:19Z
 */

https://ui5.sap.com/1.120.31/resources/sap/ui/qunit/qunit-junit.js

/*!
 * OpenUI5
 * (c) Copyright 2009-2025 SAP SE or an SAP affiliate company.
 * Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 - see LICENSE.txt.
 */

https://ui5.sap.com/1.120.31/resources/sap/ui/qunit/qunit-coverage.js

/*!
 * OpenUI5
 * (c) Copyright 2009-2025 SAP SE or an SAP affiliate company.
 * Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 - see LICENSE.txt.
 */

https://ui5.sap.com/1.120.31/resources/sap/ui/thirdparty/sinon.js

/**
 * Sinon.JS 1.14.1, 2015/03/16
 *

https://ui5.sap.com/1.120.31/resources/sap/ui/thirdparty/sinon-qunit.js

/**
 * sinon-qunit 2.0.0, 2014/05/29
 *

As you can see, those versions are over 10 years deprecated - why isn't SAP updating these dependencies?

This makes is very difficult to write tests are there are many features availble on those librarys which did not exist back in time - apart from the any other potential risks (security, performance, compatibility with modern browsers, etc) on such dependencies as well I suppose

entry.title: Duplicated GET requests in odata v4 batch
entry.content:
Hello UI5 experts!

After moving with our apps from 1.208 to 1.120, I started observing strange behaviour in OData V4 batch request to the backend.

I have simple RAP application, using List Report - Object Page floorplan. Object Page is bound to the main entity, and additionally there are a few page fragments with controls bound to different main entity's navigations. When object page renders, OData model sends one big batch containing multiple GET requests - to the main entity and to all sub-entities (from controls added as fragments). So far so good. But for some reason, all GET requests generated from page fragments are duplicated. In general it does not harm anyhow, but it results in some performance issues.

Why is it so? Did anyone observe similar behaviour?

entry.title: Where can I find business process BPMN diagrams relevant for specific industry in SAP for Me
entry.content:
Where can I find business process BPMN (best practices) Industry specific process diagrams in SAP for me. Would be helpful, if some one can guide me with screen shots. 

I have looked into Signavio Process Navigator in SAP for me, can able to see only the business process variants but not the BPMN diagrams.

entry.title: Public Checkbox Not Visible in sap.ui.comp.smartvariants SmartVariantManagement on showShare='true'
entry.content:
I'm developing a freestyle SAPUI5 application which has FilterBar with table. I am using the demoKit sample code for this: https://ui5.sap.com/#/entity/sap.ui.comp.filterbar.FilterBar/sample/sap.ui.comp.sample.filterbar.DynamicPageListReport and  smartVariantMangement control with the following configuration:

<f:heading>
                    <svm:SmartVariantManagement id="svm" showShare="true" standardItemText="{i18n>reviewTitle}" />
                </f:heading>

Also, in my manifest.json, I have: "flexEnabled": true 

  • SAPUI5 version: 1.120.6

  • Backend: Java-based CAP application

  • Deployment: Both frontend and backend are deployed to SAP BTP (Fiori Launchpad site)

However, when I try to save a variant/view, the "Public" checkbox is not visible in the Save As or Manage Views dialogs.

Possible Issue:

I suspect this might be due to missing authorization, but I am unsure how this applies to BTP-only apps
Is there a way to enable public variant support or check missing authorizations in the BTP context?

 SAPUI5

entry.title: Inspection lot creation
entry.content:
Can I create 08 type inspection lot through GR with movement type 101 for STO process as per SAP standard .

2.Can one inspection lot UD code from one plant transfer to another inspection lot UD code through SAP standard process (configuration)?

3. Can usage type for inspection plan control the inspection lot creation in standard

entry.title: Fiori App Controller Extension: Overrides not being triggered successfully
entry.content:
I'm trying to make a simple controller extension, which would hook onto a method when user clicks a button. The name of this method is "onClickActionC_MaintenanceJobWorkItemTPHeader1."

I've tried the following code, and several variations, trying to get a simple console.log message, but I can't get any of the methods below to trigger. Is there something I'm missing in order to get any of the below methods to trigger after their respective base controller methods are called?

 

sap.ui.define(
    [
        'sap/ui/core/mvc/ControllerExtension',
        'sap/ui/core/mvc/OverrideExecution'
    ],

   
    function (
        ControllerExtension,
        OverrideExecution //,Dialog, Button, mobileLibrary
       
    ) {
        console.log("testing 1");
        "use strict";
       
        return ControllerExtension.extend("customer.zperform.maintenance.jobs.PopupMessage", {
            metadata: {
                methods: {
                    onclick: {
                        public: true,
                        final: false,
                        overrideExecution: "After",
                    },

                    onmousedown: {
                        public: true,
                        final: false,
                        overrideExecution: "After",
                    },

                    onClickActionC_MaintenanceJobWorkItemTPHeader1: {
                        public: true,
                        final: false,
                        overrideExecution: "After",
                    },
                }
            },
            override: {
                onclick: function (oEvent) {
                    console.log("testing 2");
                },

                onmousedown: function (oEvent) {
                    console.log("testing 2");
                },
               
                onClickActionC_MaintenanceJobWorkItemTPHeader1: function (oEvent) {
                    console.log("testing 2");
                }
            }
        });
    }
)
 
 
 
Manifest: 
{
"fileName": "manifest",
"layer": "CUSTOMER_BASE",
"fileType": "appdescr_variant",
"reference": "i2d.eam.perfmaintjobs.manages1",
"id": "customer.zperform.maintenance.jobs",
"namespace": "apps/i2d.eam.perfmaintjobs.manages1/appVariants/customer.zperform.maintenance.jobs/",
"version": "0.1.0",
"content": [
{
"changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
"content": {
"modelId": "i18n"
},
"texts": {
"i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties"
}
},
{
"changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
"content": {
"modelId": "@i18n"
},
"texts": {
"i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties"
}
},
{
"changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
"content": {
"modelId": "i18n|sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ListReport|C_MaintenanceJobWorkItemTP"
},
"texts": {
"i18n": "i18n/ListReport/C_MaintenanceJobWorkItemTP/i18n.properties"
}
},
{
"changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
"content": {
"modelId": "i18n|sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage|C_MaintenanceJobWorkItemTP"
},
"texts": {
"i18n": "i18n/ObjectPage/C_MaintenanceJobWorkItemTP/i18n.properties"
}
},
{
"changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
"content": {
"modelId": "i18n|sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage|C_MaintenanceJobTP"
},
"texts": {
"i18n": "i18n/ObjectPage/C_MaintenanceJobTP/i18n.properties"
}
},
{
"changeType": "appdescr_ui5_setMinUI5Version",
"content": {
"minUI5Version": "1.108.38"
}
},
{
"changeType": "appdescr_app_setTitle",
"content": {},
"texts": {
"i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties"
}
}
]
}

entry.title: Situation Handling - autoclose of situations
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am using the situation handling extended framework to set up notifications. I want the batch job to re-visit all open situations and update the notification with the current status (update the text on the notification). I also want the situations to be auto-closed if they no longer fulfill the trigger requirements. Is there any setting to define this behavior? Using SAP Public cloud.

Thank you!

entry.title: which ui5 component to be used
entry.content:
i am trying to replicate the above UI but i achieved the bellow :

code :

<mvc:View
    controllerName="timetracking.controller.View1"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
    xmlns="sap.m"
    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
    xmlns:fb="sap.ui.comp.filterbar"
    xmlns:f="sap.f"
>
    <f:DynamicPage>
        <f:title>
            <f:DynamicPageTitle>
                <f:heading>
                    <Title text="Time Tracking" />
                </f:heading>
            </f:DynamicPageTitle>
        </f:title>

        <f:header>
            <f:DynamicPageHeader>
                <f:content>
                    <fb:FilterBar
                        id="filterBar"
                        useToolbar="false"
                    >
                        <fb:filterGroupItems>
                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="ActivityType"
                                label="Activity Type"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <ComboBox items="{/ActivityTypes}">
                                        <core:Item
                                            key="{key}"
                                            text="{text}"
                                        />
                                    </ComboBox>
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="Order"
                                label="Order"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <Input />
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="User"
                                label="User"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <Input />
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="WorkCenter"
                                label="Work Center"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <ComboBox items="{/WorkCenters}">
                                        <core:Item
                                            key="{key}"
                                            text="{text}"
                                        />
                                    </ComboBox>
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="Status"
                                label="Status"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <ComboBox items="{/Statuses}">
                                        <core:Item
                                            key="{key}"
                                            text="{text}"
                                        />
                                    </ComboBox>
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="TimeRange"
                                label="Time Range"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <DateRangeSelection
                                        displayFormat="MMM dd, yyyy"
                                    />
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>
                        </fb:filterGroupItems>
                    </fb:FilterBar>
                </f:content>
            </f:DynamicPageHeader>
        </f:header>

        <f:content>
            <VBox>
                <!-- Progress Bars -->
                <ProgressIndicator
                    percentValue="45"
                    displayValue="45%"
                    width="100%"
                    state="Success"
                />
                <ProgressIndicator
                    percentValue="70"
                    displayValue="70%"
                    width="100%"
                    state="Warning"
                />

                <!-- Table -->
                <Table
                    id="timeTable"
                    items="{/TimeRecords}"
                    inset="false"
                >
                    <columns>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="Activity Type" />
                        </Column>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="Order" />
                        </Column>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="User" />
                        </Column>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="Work Center" />
                        </Column>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="Status" />
                        </Column>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="Date" />
                        </Column>
                    </columns>
                    <items>
                        <ColumnListItem>
                            <cells>
                                <Text text="{ActivityType}" />
                                <Text text="{Order}" />
                                <Text text="{User}" />
                                <Text text="{WorkCenter}" />
                                <Text text="{Status}" />
                                <Text text="{Date}" />
                            </cells>
                        </ColumnListItem>
                    </items>
                </Table>
            </VBox>
        </f:content>
    </f:DynamicPage>
</mvc:View>

please help me to fix this

entry.title: Report on suppliers' bank data
entry.content:
Hello,
I need to create a report showing all bank accounts recorded in multiple vendor records - and it has to include dates when each bank account was added to the records. Does anyone know which report (or combination of reports) could I use to obtain that?
